title: UX Page
heroText: Andrew Whited is a senior design leader bringing order and elegance to complexity
aboutHeading: Foundation before surface, system before screen. I've been leading principled design across product teams at scale for over a decade — before forming a multidiscipline creative studio.

aboutThemes.title: Design leadership at scale
aboutThemes.body: Over a decade leading design across enterprise product organizations at IBM. Regulated industries, multi-team platforms, senior stakeholders. I've led teams, mentored designers, and worked to ensure user-centered design earns a seat at the table.

aboutThemes.title: Systems and information architecture
aboutThemes.body: Good organization is the precondition for good design. I focus on information architecture — how information is arranged, how the system works, and how users orient themselves. Most problems are structural before they are aesthetic.

aboutThemes.title: AI fluency
aboutThemes.body: AI has been part of my work for most of my career. I design and ship products that extend user capabilities, with a focus on user experience, explainability, and trust.

publications.title: Automatic Content Transfer to a Physically Present Person Based on NLP
UXR System and Method using AI to Facilitate and Enhance Research Activities
